actions.display_name: Create IcM Ticket for Service Team
actions.description: Create an IcM ticket for the owning service team with investigation findings, confirmed hypothesis, and evidence summary. Links the ticket to the triggering incident if one exists.

payload_template.title: RATIO Investigation: {hypothesis_statement}

actions.display_name: Create IcM Ticket for Dependency Service Team
actions.description: Create an IcM ticket for the dependency service team when a dependency failure is confirmed. Requires human approval since it targets a team outside the primary service.

payload_template.title: RATIO: Dependency Failure Impacting {customer_name} — {hypothesis_statement}

actions.description: Send an email notification to the AED team with the investigation summary, confirmed hypothesis, customer impact, and recommended next steps.

payload_template.subject: RATIO Alert: {hypothesis_name} — {customer_name}

actions.description: Schedule a follow-up SLI/incident re-check after 30 minutes to verify the issue is resolving. Applicable when an active outage or SLI breach is confirmed — validates that remediation is taking effect.

Escalate to CritSit or DRI (Designated Responsible Individual) when high-confidence confirmation of broad customer impact — multiple subscriptions, regions, or customers affected. Requires human approval.

actions.display_name: Link Support Ticket to IcM Incident
actions.description: Link the customer's support ticket to the correlated IcM incident. Applicable when HYP-OUT-004 confirms a direct ticket-to-incident correlation — ensures the support case is tracked against the platform incident.
